message: Jake
Yuriko
Kristy
San, I'm so thrilled! I can't believe I get to come to Chantal, famous for being so popular in New York that it's impossible to get a reservation.
I'm really surprised. You managed to get a reservation, right?
Hehe, just leave it to me. But isn't it a bit cool?
Thank you for inviting me too.
I wanted to come here, but I couldn't get a reservation at all.
That's right. Since it opened, it's been hugely popular for its delicious food and great atmosphere.
Ah, I'm so glad to see you so happy.
Can I consider it even?
I-I don't really understand, but it's all even now, okay? Right, Boss?
Even without all this, it was already even a long time ago. Let's forget about that.
Thank you.
I thought it might have been good if we had continued as we were.
Huh?
You would have probably cared for me gently, right?
That is...
I don't know.
W-Well, it's okay, isn't it? Now let's enjoy the food,
everyone.
Right. It would be a waste to let the delicious food cool down.
We were gathered around the table in a friendly atmosphere.
Fun times had passed until the appetizers and soup arrived.
was having a great time, genuinely smiling, that was until then.
The waitress carrying the main dish lost her grip, and by chance, the knife fell to the floor. That was all that happened.
Immediately after, the face color changed.
did something unbelievable.
suddenly stood up and yanked the tablecloth.
The three main dishes placed on the table went to pieces, leaving the surrounding customers in shock.
Kuh.
Wow.
!! Oh no, the lobster!
I don't know.
I didn't do it.
Just calm down.
The knife fell. It's just that, so why?
No, it's not me.
It's not my fault. I'm not at fault.
I said,
as I carried it out of the restaurant and delivered it home.
I'm not at fault.
What does that even mean?
Maybe consulting Günter will help clarify things.
After all,
is it still not okay?
